nasb.text: When they had performed everything according to the Law of the Lord, they returned to Galilee, to their own city of Nazareth.

esv.text: And when they had performed everything according to the Law of the Lord, they returned into Galilee, to their own town of Nazareth.

cnv.text: 他們按著主的律法辦完一切，就回加利利，到自己的城拿撒勒去了。

ccb.text: 约瑟和玛丽亚办完了主的律法规定的一切事之后，就回到他们的家乡——加利利的拿撒勒。

csbs.text: 约瑟和玛丽亚按照主的律法办完了一切事以后，就返回加利利，到自己的城拿撒勒去了。
